steps.t: Búrzkala, Kúfuzg, and Hongoi are Orc-camps in the northern reaches of Gathbúrz. Ningloril has asked you to slay the uruk-commanders of the large camps…
Ningloril is in Thangúlhad, the closest camp of the Golden Host to Dol Guldur. You have defeated the uruk-commanders in Búrzkala, Kúfuzg, and Hongoi a…
